response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the role. Their background is overwhelmingly in web/mobile full-stack development and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or system-level performance optimization for AI hardware.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
Extensive experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Lacks background in deep learning workload analysis or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI accelerator hardware experience
